name: Dyno Nobel Limited.
analysis: DNL has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$3.7478. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$3.7478, stop A$3.5261, target A$3.9200. Risk/reward is 0.78:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
